description_long: This object consists of two vintage-style gas pumps, one green and one red, mounted on a concrete island with a weathered, stained surface. The pumps are flanked by several old tires and a rusty barrel, adding to the aged, abandoned appearance. Each pump features a round analog display at the top, visible hoses, and worn metal casings with peeling paint. A small, central pump or meter sits between the two main pumps, and a manual price sign is positioned at one end of the island. The surrounding ground is a patchy, dirt-covered surface, further emphasizing the neglected, retro aesthetic. No canopy or modern amenities are present, and the overall scene evokes a mid-20th-century rural or roadside gas station.
description: A pair of vintage, weathered gas pumps on a concrete island, surrounded by old tires and a rusty barrel, with a manual price sign and no canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing both gas pumps, the central meter, tires, barrel, and the manual price sign on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the red pump, the manual price sign, and the narrow profile of the island.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both pumps, the central meter, and the arrangement of tires and barrel.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the green pump, with two tires and the barrel more prominently visible.
attribute_fuel_pumps: There are two vintage fuel pumps, one green and one red, each with a round analog display at the top, visible hoses, and metal casings with peeling paint. A smaller central pump or meter is also present. No digital displays or visible branding are apparent.
attribute_station_signage: No main brand signage is visible. There is a small manual price sign on a stand at one end of the island, with handwritten or printed numbers.
attribute_price_display_board: A small manual price display board is present at the end of the island, showing a single price listing in a vertical format. No digital or illuminated boards are visible.
